description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages named openMr and otherStages, using the tmaier/gitlab-auto-merge-request Docker image. Add a job called Open Merge Request that runs in the openMr stage, sets the variable GIT_STRATEGY to none, and is limited to branches matching the regex ^feature\/.* via an only rule. The job executes the single shell command merge-request.sh. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
